title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Bandhan Bank - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Bandhan Bank - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Bandhan Bank! We are hiring a Risk Analyst for our Bhubaneswar team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Bandhan Bank:
Bandhan Bank is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Ind AS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bandhan Bank!
